projects.name: Prineville Data Center
projects.notes: Meta's first owned-and-operated data center; campus has expanded multiple times since launch.

projects.name: Newton County Data Center (Stanton Springs)
projects.notes: Drew local concern after large groundwater withdrawals were reported by local news outlets.

projects.name: Richland Parish Data Center
projects.notes: Announced as Meta's largest data center campus; expected to drive significant new electricity demand on Entergy's Louisiana grid.
projects.source_title: Meta — Investing $10 billion in Richland Parish, Louisiana (Dec 2024)

projects.name: The Dalles Data Center
projects.notes: Google's first dedicated data center campus. Water usage volumes were disclosed only after a multi-year public-records lawsuit.

projects.name: Council Bluffs Data Center
projects.notes: One of Google's largest U.S. campuses; cumulative investment exceeds $5B across multiple expansions.

projects.name: Mesa Data Center
projects.notes: Sited in a high-water-stress region; Google has highlighted air-cooling and reclaimed-water investments.

projects.name: Quincy Datacenter Campus
projects.notes: Microsoft's flagship cloud campus; powered largely by Columbia River hydropower.

projects.name: Mount Pleasant Datacenter Campus
projects.notes: Sited on land originally assembled for the canceled Foxconn project; paired with $50M+ in community investments.

projects.name: Goodyear Datacenter Campus
projects.notes: Located in metro Phoenix; community concerns have focused on aquifer use as Maricopa County faces ongoing water-supply scrutiny.

projects.name: AWS US-East-1 (Northern Virginia)
projects.notes: AWS's largest U.S. presence and the heart of 'Data Center Alley'; concentration has driven both substantial tax revenue and persistent local debate over land use, transmission corridors, and noise.
projects.source_title: AWS Global Infrastructure — US East (N. Virginia)

projects.name: Project Rainier (New Carlisle)
projects.notes: AWS-built compute cluster anchored by hundreds of thousands of AWS Trainium2 chips; primary tenant is Anthropic for frontier model training.
projects.source_title: AWS to invest $11B in Indiana for new data center campus (Oct 2024)

projects.name: Cumberland Valley Data Center Campus
projects.notes: Two-campus build on land adjoining the Susquehanna nuclear plant, structured around a behind-the-meter PPA with Talen Energy.

projects.name: Stargate Abilene Campus
projects.notes: First Stargate site, developed by Crusoe and operated as Oracle Cloud Infrastructure capacity for OpenAI. Initial buildings underway in 2024–2025.

projects.name: OCI Stargate Capacity (Abilene)
projects.notes: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure capacity tenancy at the Stargate Abilene campus, contracted to OpenAI as the primary workload.
projects.source_title: Oracle and OpenAI extend cloud partnership (2024)

projects.name: Colossus Supercomputer (Memphis)
projects.notes: Built in roughly four months in a former Electrolux plant in southwest Memphis; on-site gas turbines drew air-quality complaints from neighbouring residents and the local NAACP chapter.
